name: APT41
akas: Wicked Panda, BARIUM, Winnti, Double Dragon (PRC)
brief: Through August 2025, GTIG observed APT41 using Gemini for C++/Golang code development on multiple tools — including a C2 framework the actor called OSSTUN — and for code-obfuscation help using public obfuscation libraries. GTIG
ttpMd:
**LLM-aided development** T1587.001 - Develop Capabilities: Malware

**LLM-optimized payload crafting** T1027 - Obfuscated Files/Information

T1071 - Application Layer Protocol (C2 development)
